scripts.test:e2e: sh -c 'NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 npm run dev -- --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3000 >/tmp/agent-flight-recorder-playwright.log 2>&1 & SERVER_PID=$!; trap "kill $SERVER_PID" EXIT; until curl --noproxy '*' -sf http://127.0.0.1:3000 >/dev/null; do sleep 1; done; npx playwright test'
scripts.test:e2e:ui: sh -c 'NEXT_PUBLIC_API_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:8000 npm run dev -- --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3000 >/tmp/agent-flight-recorder-playwright-ui.log 2>&1 & SERVER_PID=$!; trap "kill $SERVER_PID" EXIT; until curl --noproxy '*' -sf http://127.0.0.1:3000 >/dev/null; do sleep 1; done; npx playwright test --ui'
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
scripts.verify:full: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:e2e && npm run build
scripts.check: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck
